build.beforeBuildCommand: pnpm.cmd --filter @mengine/api build && pnpm.cmd --filter @mengine/behaviour build && pnpm.cmd --filter @mengine/agent build && npm.cmd run build && node ../../scripts/prepare-editor-build-sdk.mjs

security.csp: default-src 'self' customprotocol: asset:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' http://localhost:5173; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:5173 ws://localhost:5173; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob: http://asset.localhost http://localhost:5173; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://localhost:5173; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' http://localhost:5173
